notes: Update notice is now part of the boot page instead of a floating popup. The 'NEW TACTICAL DATA SYNCED - TAP TO RELOAD' toast (#phantom-ghost-toast, previously position:fixed at top of viewport, appended to body) is replaced by an inline .boot-item row injected into #boot .boot-items directly below the 'Ghost Echo - Phantom' row. It uses the same dot + label + badge anatomy as the other boot rows (burnt-orange dot with soft pulse, 'New tactical data synced' label, burnt-orange 'TAP TO RELOAD' badge), so it reads as part of the panel. Tap or Enter still posts SKIP_WAITING to the waiting SW and reloads into the new build (same behavior as before). In-app update detection (boot screen already dismissed) is carried by the existing SW status pill in the NOW header - no floating popup anywhere now. Removed dead CSS (#phantom-ghost-toast fixed-position rule + @keyframes ghost-toast-in). No other JS, no functional surfaces, no onclick targets touched. SW CACHE_VERSION bumped together. Builds on v1.6.35 (which removed the @media min-width:600px desktop column clamp; laptop renders full-width responsive).
